description: Route this task to the correct category shuttle or explain the ambiguity. The user wants to wire a new API endpoint to a frontend settings form. The changed files span two categories: `src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/Components/SettingsForm.tsx` (matches `category client-frontend { patterns ["src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/**"] }`) and `src/2.Application/DST.Api/Controllers/SettingsController.cs` (matches `category backend-api { patterns ["src/2.Application/DST.Api/**"] }`). How should Tapestry route this cross-category task?
